repo_name: Local more assets to ingest drop
intended_use: Template polish candidates for the expanded RPG and non-RPG starter families
Editor asset browser discovery from quarantined local packs
Curated future bundle promotion after per-pack attribution and license review
WYSIWYG showcase visual and audio candidate review
notes: Captured from the local folder previously named 'more assets to ingest'.
407 archives were inventoried: 319 ZIP archives and 88 RAR archives.
All ZIP and RAR archives were extracted into raw quarantine under imports/raw/more_assets_to_ingest.
The catalog records 20229 raw quarantine assets across 407 pack roots.
The full drop is catalog-normalized for local editor/library use under imports/reports/asset_intake/more_assets_to_ingest_promotion_catalog.json.
Most cataloged assets remain non-release quarantine until curated bundle manifests and attribution records are approved.
BND-004 promotes 14 selected CC0/public-domain starter assets with checksums and attribution evidence.
BND-006 promotes 12430 unique app-usable CC0/public-domain payloads with checksums, attribution evidence, and package destinations; default export bundling is deferred until project selection.
BND-007 promotes 4697 additional app-usable payloads unlocked by source-folder and archive license evidence; default export bundling is deferred until project selection.
Duplicate payloads, source/tool/archive files, invalid payloads, non-OGG audio originals, and packs without CC0/public-domain release evidence remain raw quarantine/local catalog only.
